title: DupKeys
description: Adds 8 Virtual Keys to bind multiple physical keys to the same action.
body:
This mod adds a way to bind multiple physical keys to the same action. Ill do an example here:

Let's say you want to bind the attack/break key to the left mouse button and the button 'n'.

Then you'd first open the config `dupkeys-client.toml` and set the value of `kb1` to `key.attack`. To find out the action ids, you can take a look in `options.txt`.

Then from in-game in the `Controls` options, you can bind the Virtaul Key 1 to `n` and you'll be able to trigger the attack/break key with both left click and `n`.
